title: Kadukka
overview: In a peaceful village, Two Young best Friends fall for the same Beautiful Girl. What starts as friendship soon turns into a comedy-filled Love war. Each tries to win her heart with charm, tricks, and emotions, but the girl has a surprise of her own is shown in a Comedy Suspense with Fun filled power packed manner.
